top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(crime_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT d.district_id, COUNT(*) AS crime_count
    FROM district d
    INNER JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
    INNER JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
    INNER JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE a.date >= '1997-01-01'
    GROUP BY d.district_id
    HAVING crime_count > 4000
) AS subquery;

SELECT AVG(crime_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT district_id, COUNT(*) AS crime_count 
    FROM client 
    WHERE district_id IN (
        SELECT district_id 
        FROM account 
        WHERE strftime('%Y', date) >= '1997' 
        GROUP BY district_id
    )
    GROUP BY district_id 
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 4000
) AS high_crime_regions;

SELECT AVG(crime_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT d.district_id, COUNT(*) AS crime_count
    FROM district d
    INNER JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
    INNER JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
    INNER JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE a.date >= '1997-01-01'
    GROUP BY d.district_id
    HAVING crime_count > 4000
) AS subquery;

SELECT AVG(A10) 
FROM district 
WHERE A10 > 4000 
  AND district_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT district_id 
    FROM account 
    WHERE date >= '1997-01-01'
  );

SELECT AVG(crime_count)

final.sql:
SELECT AVG(crime_count) 
FROM (
    SELECT d.district_id, COUNT(*) AS crime_count
    FROM district d
    INNER JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
    INNER JOIN disp dp ON c.client_id = dp.client_id
    INNER JOIN account a ON dp.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE a.date >= '1997-01-01'
    GROUP BY d.district_id
    HAVING crime_count > 4000
) AS subquery;
